requests.prompt: Vertical 9:16 one-take ad for Apple iPhone: prove A premium smartphone that opens fast and captures sharp everyday moments in one tap. Same character and setting: Young adult in late 20s with medium skin tone, short dark hair, natural look; White crew-neck tee with a light gray cardigan and dark. Start pain: Vertical, locked-off medium-wide shot in a bright, minimalist living room. The young adult raises a matte black smartphone with the screen dark as a small tan dog springs up to catch a red plush. Shift to proof without cuts or scene changes: Vertical, locked-off close medium shot centered on the smartphone held in both hands at chest height. The camera preview is already open, framing the same small tan dog with a red plush ball in the bright living room. As the dog leaps, the user calmly taps a large white circular shutter button. Keep one scene, one main subject, controlled camera, natural motion, stable face/hands/product, and sharp proof detail. No subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, extra characters, montage, split screen, or shaky camera.
requests.negative_prompt: cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail

audio_directions: Quick light percussive sting, a soft phone buzz SFX, natural room tone; subtle disappointed sigh. No voiceover.
Clean, confident beat fades in; soft whoosh as the phone tilts; crisp camera shutter click; music continues warm and minimal. Optional gentle VO: “Capture it, fast.”

critic_expectation.purpose: Show a complete one-take ad for Apple iPhone: You miss spontaneous moments because the camera isn’t ready and fast action turns into a blur. resolves into A premium smartphone that opens fast and captures sharp everyday moments in one tap.
must_show: single continuous one-take full ad with no cuts, montage, split screen, or scene changes

opens with the customer pain: Vertical, locked-off medium-wide shot in a bright, minimalist living room. The young adult raises a matte black smartphone with the screen dark as a small tan dog springs up to catch a red plush ball in the foreground. The user swipes at the dark screen, trying to open the camera, then looks up as the dog lands—subtle, disappointed exhale. Clean, premium composition with soft, natural light and uncluttered background.

then transitions naturally into the product proof: Vertical, locked-off close medium shot centered on the smartphone held in both hands at chest height. The camera preview is already open, framing the same small tan dog with a red plush ball in the bright living room. As the dog leaps, the user calmly taps a large white circular shutter button once. A crisp shutter click is heard. The user then tilts the phone slightly toward the lens so the screen fills most of the frame, showing the captured photo.
physically plausible sequential motion in one scene
same recurring character, wardrobe, and scene from asset memory: Young adult in late 20s with medium skin tone, short dark hair, natural look.; White crew-neck tee with a light gray.
must_avoid: cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail
unrequested subtitles, captions, UI, watermarks, fake logos, background text, or random letters
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
the pain-to-proof transition is readable without cuts
key proof or problem detail is visible, sharp, and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
